# NOTDOLLAR

> Marketing. AI. Design. For builders creating audience, products, and freedom.

NOTDOLLAR is a brand and digital movement founded in Annaba, Algeria by Seif Eddine Haddad.
Its philosophy: leverage is the ability to move further than your resources should allow.
It focuses on leverage-based thinking for creators from the Global South — builders who
create audience, products, and freedom without waiting for permission, capital, or gatekeepers.

Core disciplines: Marketing creates distribution. AI creates amplification. Design creates trust.
Together, they create leverage.

## Flagship Product

"No Permission" — A manifesto for builders.
Not motivation. Not theory. A practical mindset for builders creating leverage before
gatekeepers can define them.
Available at: https://notdollar.gumroad.com/l/NoPermission
